🌼 mimosa

Sepolia demo

Reactive orders for a Uniswap v4 hook.

Pick a demo policy, fund the hook, and register a trigger. Reactive Network watches pool activity and delivers the callback when the price condition is crossed.

Uniswap v4 hook Reactive callback flow Sepolia-first deploy
1

Choose a template

Start from a buy-dip or sell-rally policy instead of typing raw values.

2

Fund the hook

Use a preset asset or paste a custom token that matches the pool input side.

3

Register and monitor

The hook remains the trust anchor. Execution is re-validated on-chain.

Hook —
Deployment Pending

Demo Setup

This UI is tuned for Sepolia. Choose a template, paste the hook-enabled pool ID, and optionally inspect the current `sqrtPriceX96`.

Choose a template.
—

Fund The Hook

Deposits stay in `MimosaHook` until you withdraw, cancel, expire, or execute a policy.

Pick an asset preset to begin.
—

Launch Policy

Keep the pool and template values tight. The hook will reject stale or invalid trigger executions anyway.

Your Policies

Fast local scan of policies owned by the connected account.

No policies yet.
